task_completion.description: Create the required layers for the drawing
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layer List panel in LibreCAD shows the newly created layers: ROAD_EDGE, CURB_RETURN, CENTER_LINE, and ANNOTATIONS.

task_completion.description: Draw the straight boundaries for the Main Road and Branch Road
task_completion.visual_evidence: Horizontal lines for the Main Road and vertical lines for the Branch Road are visible in the drawing area, forming the outer boundary of a T-intersection.

task_completion.description: Draw two curb return arcs connecting the Branch Road to the Main Road
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two curved lines (arcs) are visible connecting the inner corners (NW and NE) of the T-intersection where the straight road edges meet.

task_completion.description: Draw center lines for both roads
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lines are drawn along the center of the Main Road (horizontal) and Branch Road (vertical), forming a 'T' or cross shape inside the road boundaries.

task_completion.description: Add text labels for the roads
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'MAIN ROAD' and 'BRANCH ROAD' is visible in the drawing area.

task_completion.description: Add dimension lines showing the widths of both roads
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dimension lines with arrows and numbers (12 and 8) indicating the width of the Main Road and Branch Road are visible.

task_completion.description: Save the drawing as a DXF file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or the LibreCAD window title bar shows 't_intersection.dxf' being saved to the /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreCAD GUI to create the drawing
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreCAD's graphical interface (toolbars, drawing area, layer list) rather than a terminal or text editor writing DXF code directly.
Sequential screenshots show the drawing progressing (e.g., layers added, lines drawn, then arcs, then text) rather than the finished drawing appearing instantly from a pre-loaded file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use external scripts to generate the file
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing python or bash scripts being executed to bypass the manual CAD drawing process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/t_intersection.dxf. Required layers: ROAD_EDGE, CURB_RETURN, CENTER_LINE, ANNOTATIONS. Required text: 'MAIN' and 'BRANCH'. Main road width is 12.0m, Branch road width is 8.0m. Curb radius is 8.0m (acceptable tolerance is ±0.5m, so 7.5 to 8.5m).
